title: The Ruins Point Toward the Bell
description: Enel uses his power to dominate the survivors, showing that ordinary resistance cannot stop a god made of lightning.
scene: Across pages 6, 7, 8, 9, this scene centers on Eneru, Narrator, Luffy, Nola, Enel. Enel uses his power to dominate the survivors, showing that ordinary resistance cannot stop a god made of lightning.

dialogue.speaker: Nola
dialogue.text: It seems that... you don't under- stand

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even the country itself has sinned greatly!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I simply seek to return, can fall!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is the ideal world I seek!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is what I deserve to have!!!

summary: Enel uses his power to dominate the survivors, showing that ordinary resistance cannot stop a god made of lightning.
